use_cases: Landing page hero section with animated gradient background
Portfolio or creative showcase with atmospheric visual effects
SaaS dashboard header with subtle film grain texture
Video streaming or media platform background layers
ai_summary: A decorative gradient mesh background component with animated film grain overlay, built with canvas API. Creates an atmospheric blueprint-style visual effect suitable for hero sections, landing pages, or as a backdrop for content-heavy interfaces. Responds to window resizing and runs smooth 60fps animation loop for the noise texture.
